TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Samuluh ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 56 buwan, 255 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 243 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 86%, Amis 2%, Paywan 2%, Puyuma 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Samuluh hya' ga Sulai-iaz. tay 'zil na Samuluh hya' ga Vahu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēamuluńß …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu umitan …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, amis~…ē *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na s~…ēamuluńß ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēulai-iaz. taj Ēzil na s~…ēamuluńß ńßja Ē …£a *ańßu. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Samuluh ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 56 buwan, 255 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 243 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 86%, Amis 2%, Paywan 2%, Puyuma 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Samuluh hya' ga Sulai-iaz. tay 'zil na Samuluh hya' ga Vahu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
